revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-035

An electrochemical cell which remains sealed providing it is operated within its designed specified limits but has a re-sealable valve to release gas if the internal pressure exceeds a pre-set value. Water and electrolyte cannot be added.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Sealed cell}}
